claim: Extended thinking models like Kimi K2 use additional compute during reasoning to generate step-by-step outputs, improving accuracy on complex reasoning tasks.
actionable: For complex reasoning tasks, consider using models with extended thinking capabilities to allocate more compute to the reasoning process.
source_title: NEW Top Open Model - Kimi K2 Thinking

claim: Open-source models are progressively matching closed-model performance on reasoning benchmarks, reducing vendor lock-in for applications requiring advanced reasoning.
actionable: Evaluate open-source alternatives to closed models for reasoning tasks before defaulting to proprietary options.
source_title: NEW Top Open Model - Kimi K2 Thinking
